title: Privacy Policy
intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Non Prep Veneer collects, uses, shares, and protects the information you provide when you use this website, request a smile assessment, or contact us. By using the site, you agree to the practices described in this policy.

sections.heading: Information we collect
body: Information you provide directly: when you use the smile assessment tool, you may upload a photo of your smile and submit your name and phone number. When you reach out through WhatsApp or the contact details on this site, we receive the contact information and the content of the messages you choose to send.

Information collected automatically: like most websites, we may collect basic technical data such as your device type, browser, approximate location, and general usage patterns. This helps us keep the site secure, diagnose problems, and improve performance.

sections.heading: How we use your information
body: We use the information you provide to respond to your enquiries, evaluate your smile assessment request, schedule and prepare for consultations, and communicate with you about our services.
We may use aggregated, non-identifying usage data to understand how the site is used and to improve our content and services. We do not sell your personal information to anyone.

sections.heading: Legal bases for processing
body: We process your information on one or more of the following bases: your consent (for example, when you upload a photo or send us a message); our legitimate interests in operating, securing, and improving the site and responding to your requests; and compliance with legal obligations that apply to us.
Where we rely on consent, you may withdraw it at any time, which will not affect processing carried out before the withdrawal.

sections.heading: Photos and assessment data
body: Photos and details submitted through the smile assessment are used solely to provide you with guidance and to follow up on your request. We treat these images as sensitive and limit access to the staff involved in responding to you.
You may ask us to delete a photo or an entire assessment submission at any time using the contact details below, and we will do so unless we are required to retain it by law.

sections.heading: Storage, retention and security
body: We retain personal information only for as long as necessary for the purposes described in this policy and to meet legal, accounting, or reporting obligations. When it is no longer needed, it is deleted or anonymised.

We apply reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect your information against unauthorised access, loss, alteration, or misuse. However, no method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

sections.heading: Sharing and third-party services
body: Messages you send through WhatsApp are handled under WhatsApp's own terms and privacy policy; we recommend reviewing their policy to understand how that service processes your data.

We may use trusted service providers (for example, website hosting or analytics) that process data on our behalf and only according to our instructions. We may also disclose information where required by law or to protect our legal rights. We do not sell your personal information.

sections.heading: Cookies and analytics
body: The site may use cookies or similar technologies to remember your preferences and measure general traffic so we can improve the experience. You can control or disable cookies through your browser settings, although some features of the site may not work as intended if you do.

sections.heading: Children's privacy
body: This site and our services are not directed to children. Minors should use the site only with the involvement of a parent or legal guardian, and any information relating to the treatment of a minor should be provided by their parent or guardian.
If you believe a child has provided us with personal information without appropriate consent, please contact us so we can remove it.

sections.heading: Your rights
body: Subject to applicable law, you have the right to access the personal information we hold about you; to request correction of inaccurate data; to request erasure of your data; to restrict or object to certain processing; to request a copy of your data in a portable format; and to withdraw consent where processing is based on consent.

You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a competent data protection authority. To exercise any of these rights, contact us using the details below and we will respond within a reasonable time.

sections.heading: Marketing communications
body: We contact you primarily to respond to your requests. Any marketing communication is sent only with your consent or in direct connection with a service you requested, and you can opt out at any time by letting us know.

sections.heading: Changes to this policy
body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes take effect when posted on this page, and the "last updated" date above reflects the most recent revision. Your continued use of the site after a change means you accept the updated policy.

sections.heading: Contact us
body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or about how your information is handled, you can contact Non Prep Veneer by phone or WhatsApp at +964 773 070 0085.
